name: Fission Uranium Corp.
content: Fission Uranium is a resource company focused on the strategic development of the Triple R uranium deposit at its Patterson Lake South (PLS) project in Canada's Athabasca Basin. Triple R is one of the largest high-grade, near-surface uranium deposits in the world. Recently acquired by Paladin Energy, Fission’s assets are a key component of a new global uranium champion, providing significant scale and high-grade production potential for the next decade.
